title: symphyotrichum novi-belgii var. tardiflorum
intro: Symphyotrichum novi-belgii var. tardiflorum, also known as New York aster, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum novi-belgii var. tardiflorum include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, teas, and topical applications, with some using it to treat minor skin irritations and digestive issues.
